message.content:
@startuml
skinparam UMLClassBoxStyle {
    borderStyle solid
    backgroundColor #f5f5f5
    borderColor #ccc
    labelBackgroundColor #e0e0e0
    labelBorderColor #999
    labelFontColor #333
    labelFontSize 12
    labelFontFamily "Arial"
}
